final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional product photography scene featuring a smartwatch on a marble surface (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "简约商务" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Swiss International Typographic Style (clean product staging), MUJI product photography heritage, 2010s Kinfolk magazine still-life visual culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a side-lit natural light composition — exact framing and angle are yours
Subject: must include the smartwatch as the hero product, a coffee cup, and a notebook arranged on a marble surface
Scene/backdrop: must include a marble tabletop surface
Lighting/mood: must be natural light from the side — exact light quality and shadow treatment are yours
Color palette: needs a clean, neutral direction that emphasizes product texture — exact tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium surface treatment — exact marble grain, matte/gloss contrast, and material weight are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
